issues.description: Lack of clear structure - no headings, no paragraphs, and no clear call-to-action.
issues.suggestion: Add a clear heading, break the text into paragraphs, and include a call-to-action.
issues.reasoning: A clear structure improves readability and engagement.

issues.description: The sentence 'Check out our new product! Amazing features await. Buy now and save 50%! Limited time offer!' is a run-on sentence and lacks clarity.
issues.suggestion: Break the sentence into multiple clear sentences, each with a specific message.
issues.reasoning: Clear sentences improve comprehension and reduce cognitive load.

structure.explanation: The content lacks a clear structure, which makes it hard to read and understand. The message is brief but lacks clarity and a clear call-to-action.

examples.quote: Check out our new product! Amazing features await. Buy now and save 50%! Limited time offer!

issues.description: The tone is overly promotional and lacks a personal touch.
issues.suggestion: Use a more conversational tone and focus on the benefits of the product.
issues.reasoning: A conversational tone improves engagement and trust.

tone.explanation: The tone is overly promotional, which may come across as insincere. A more conversational tone would improve engagement and trust.

issues.description: The language used is simple, but the message is not clear.
issues.suggestion: Use clear and concise language to convey the message.
issues.reasoning: Clear language improves comprehension and accessibility.

accessibility.explanation: The language used is simple, but the message is not clear. Clear and concise language would improve comprehension and accessibility.

issues.description: The content is not optimized for Twitter - it lacks hashtags and a clear call-to-action.
issues.suggestion: Add relevant hashtags and a clear call-to-action to improve engagement.
issues.reasoning: Optimizing content for Twitter improves engagement and reach.

platformAlignment.explanation: The content is not optimized for Twitter, which may reduce its reach and engagement. Adding relevant hashtags and a clear call-to-action would improve its performance.

issues.description: Lack of clear headings and subheadings
issues.suggestion: Add 2-3 H2 headings to break up content
Break up long sentences into shorter ones

structure.explanation: The content has a good structure, but lacks clear headings and has some long sentences. Adding headings and breaking up long sentences will improve readability.

examples.quote: Excited to share insights from our latest project on sustainable technology.
examples.issue: No heading to introduce the topic
examples.suggestion: Add a heading to introduce the topic

tone.explanation: The tone is somewhat formal, but the language is clear and concise. Using a more conversational tone will improve engagement.

issues.description: Some technical terms may be unfamiliar to non-experts
issues.suggestion: Define technical terms or provide explanations

accessibility.explanation: The content is generally accessible, but some technical terms may be unfamiliar to non-experts. Defining technical terms will improve understanding.

issues.description: Content is somewhat short for a LinkedIn post
issues.reasoning: Longer content improves engagement on LinkedIn

platformAlignment.explanation: The content is well-aligned with the LinkedIn platform, but is somewhat short. Adding more details or examples will improve engagement.

issues.description: No headings, bullets, or lists. Content is a wall of text.
issues.suggestion: Add 3-4 clear H2 headings and convert key points to bullet lists
issues.reasoning: Unstructured content has 70% higher bounce rates on blogs

issues.description: Sentences average 20+ words - exceeding the 15-20 word optimal range
issues.suggestion: Break every sentence over 20 words into 2-3 shorter sentences

structure.explanation: This content fails structural standards. No headings, no bullets, some long sentences. Requires restructuring.

examples.quote: Artificial intelligence is transforming healthcare delivery worldwide.
examples.issue: Sentence is 15 words, but could be broken up for better clarity
examples.suggestion: Break into 2 sentences: 'Artificial intelligence is transforming healthcare. It is changing delivery worldwide.'

issues.suggestion: Use more conversational and engaging tone
issues.reasoning: Tone affects reader engagement and sharing

tone.explanation: Tone is informative but lacks engagement. Could benefit from more conversational language.

issues.description: Flesch-Kincaid grade level is 12+ - requires some college education
issues.suggestion: Simplify vocabulary and sentence structure to achieve grade 9-11
issues.reasoning: Content should be accessible to 80% of target audience

accessibility.explanation: Content is somewhat difficult to read. Simplifying language and structure can improve accessibility.

issues.description: Missing some blog essentials: no subheadings, limited scannable format
issues.suggestion: Add H2/H3 headings, bullet points, and bold key phrases
issues.reasoning: Blog readers scan first - this format can improve engagement

platformAlignment.explanation: Content is somewhat aligned with blog format but can improve with additional structural elements.
